stackoverflow_2024_pro_current_use.metric: % of professional developers currently using AI tools

stackoverflow_2025_pro_daily.metric: % of professional developers using AI tools DAILY

stackoverflow_2025_pro_any_use.metric: % of professional developers using AI tools daily+weekly+monthly

stackoverflow_2025_planning.metric: % using OR planning to use AI tools (all respondents)
stackoverflow_2025_planning.source: Stack Overflow Developer Survey 2025 press release

anthropic_programmer_exposure.metric: Observed AI task coverage for Computer Programmer occupation
anthropic_programmer_exposure.notes: Share of Computer Programmer tasks with observed LLM usage per Anthropic's economic index.

copilot_accenture_daily.metric: % of Accenture developers using Copilot at least 5 days/week
copilot_accenture_daily.source: Accenture enterprise Copilot study (via GitHub blog)
copilot_accenture_daily.notes: 67% of deployed developers use Copilot at least 5 days/week.

copilot_surveys_2024_2025.metric: Rough range of regular/occasional Copilot usage in external surveys

github_copilot_adopters_total.metric: Total GitHub Copilot users (count, not share)

stackoverflow_2024_copilot_among_users.metric: Copilot usage share AMONG AI-using professional developers
stackoverflow_2024_copilot_among_users.notes: Of developers using AI agents, 67.9% use GitHub Copilot.

stackoverflow_2025_chatgpt_among_users.metric: ChatGPT usage share AMONG AI-using professional developers

stackoverflow_2025_claude_among_users.metric: Claude Code usage share AMONG AI-using professional developers
stackoverflow_2025_claude_among_users.notes: Of AI-using devs, 40.8% use Claude Code. Pro-dev rate (45%) higher than learners (30%).
